lines.speaker: Scavvo
lines.text: 'Ello matey! D'ya wanna buy some exciting new toys?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do you sell most rune armour but not platebodies?

lines.speaker: Scavvo
lines.text: Oh, you have to complete a special quest in order to wear rune platemail. You should talk to the Guildmaster downstairs about that.
